name: Rebeccas Edgerunners Apartment DLC
summary: This mod adds a purchasable version of rebeccas apartment from the cyberpunk edgerunners anime to the game
description:
[color=#00ffff][size=2][b]Basics[/b][/size][/color]
[list]
[*]This mod adds a purchasable version of rebeccas apartment to the game with sit, sleep, shower, mirror, stash, guitar, eating, drinking&smoking, coffee, tea, meditation and tv watching interactions
[*]this is the successor to [url=https://www.nexusmods.com/cyberpunk2077/mods/7871]Rebecca's Apartment [/url] which was set to hidden a long time ago
[/list]
[b][color=#00ffff]Usage[/color][/b]
[list]
[*]Find the apartment purchase icon on the map and go there to pay at the door
[/list]
[size=2][b][color=#00ffff]Features[/color][/b]
[list]
[*]Ownable room with sit, sleep, shower, mirror, guitar, eating, drinking&smoking, coffee, tea, meditation and tv watching interactions
[*]purchase price is 30000 eddies
[*]this is a complete addon so it does not conflict with anything
[/list]
[b][color=#00ffff]Donation link[/color][/b]
[/size]Like my mods? consider donating [url=https://buymeacoffee.com/krat0es]donation link[/url]

[b][color=#00ffff]Installation [/color][/b]
drag and drop the folder into your game directory

[b][color=#00ffff]Uninstallation[/color][/b]
you can look inside the zip to know which files you need to delete
author: Kratoes
